precondition: Two workspaces and two active tasks
user_task: Switch tasks during plan run and review
pass_criterion: User always identifies the true workspace task and run without help

user_task: Request file process and provider actions
pass_criterion: User understands provider egress may occur but resource effects cannot

user_task: State what leaves the device and where
pass_criterion: At least 90 percent identify source scope provider and endpoint

user_task: State current artifact and workspace status
pass_criterion: At least 90 percent distinguish accepted applied and succeeded
Stale preview is invalidated and no silent overwrite occurs

precondition: Multi-file apply fails or outcome is unknown
user_task: Explain result and next safe action
pass_criterion: No participant interprets partial or unknown as global success
Old approval cannot authorize changed scope and user can identify why

user_task: Explain whether a tool can run now
pass_criterion: User does not equate connection with execution authorization
